_comment: GATED — Task 2D.5f Phase G scaffold (Session 17). DO NOT DISPATCH unless reopening criteria are met (see ROADMAP 2D.5f). Stage-2 refine grid re-run at Npts=129 (vs hires 97). Pushes the discretization noise floor on dec_slack_min from ~5e-5 absolute (Npts=97) to ~1.5e-5 absolute (Npts=129, scaling as h^4 = (97/129)^4). Used to publish a corrected strict-pass count if the extrapolation in §11.6 (~5900/10080) is challenged externally, or if a Phase E decision-gate-C result needs higher-resolution boundary classification. ~10080 points * ~14 sec/pt at Npts=129 / 16 cores ~ 3.5 hr on cpu-xl, ~$3.50. Reopening criterion: explicit publication request OR Phase E gate-C OR independent claim disputing the §11.6 extrapolation.
